free_text: abstract, data of Subents 003,004 are given.
Co-60 sample is obtained by irradiation of Co-59
target in reactor SM-2 in neutron flux 2.14E+14
Flight base is 91.7 m, best resolution
Background without sample is 250, that with
YK ref. was corrected as J ( journal).
Ref. AE,SJA, INDC(CCP) reps. were added.
STATUS was added in data Subents.
Type of error is not explained in the
article. Supposed by compiler as "Total error" at the
Res.integral was calculated by means of res.parameters.
Type of error is not explained in the
article. Supposed by compiler as "Total error" at the
Statistical error less 1-2 % at the wings
